scripts.build: pnpm --filter @simtalk/shared-types build && pnpm --filter @simtalk/backend build && pnpm --filter @simtalk/frontend build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @simtalk/shared-types build && pnpm --filter @simtalk/backend typecheck && pnpm --filter @simtalk/frontend typecheck && pnpm typecheck:api
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @simtalk/shared-types build && pnpm --filter @simtalk/shared-types test && pnpm --filter @simtalk/backend test && pnpm --filter @simtalk/frontend test
